race.comment: DECORATIVE (10) missed a whisker in a stronger at the Sunshine Coast first-up and then folded up from the speed here over 1300m when well supported and likely had excuses. Drops back to a shorter sprint fitter and deserves another chance. Stablemate DARTH INVADER (1) resumes and has placed 2/2 fresh. Was a big Maiden winner here two back and has a low gate with Butler aboard. Likely to feature. OCEAN JOY (9) is third up and should be ready to show more like her best NSW form. Has a handy 2kg claim and will push forward. Good enough. MY SICADA (14) peaks and will be around the mark.
